Used to combine 3 _Astronomical Readings_ into a _Star Map_
block.northstar.computer_rack.tooltip.su: Can be used to store _Targeting Computers_ to reduce a rocket's _Fuel Cost_
block.northstar.ice_box.tooltip.summary: When cooled to _appropriate Temperature,_ changes the state of matter of given _ingredients._
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.behavi: Installs the fan blade in the fan.
Changes the side of the chain.
Changes the direction when spinning passively.
Removes a fan blade, if none are installed, picks up the block.
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.condit: When R-Clicked with a Fan Blade
When Wrenched with a chain attached
When Wrenched with no chain attached
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.summar: Increases the maximum area of _Oxygen_ _Sealers_ and _Temperature_ _Regulators_. Requires an _Encased_ _Chain_ _Drive_ adjacent to the fan to be powered. Spins passively if no chain is attached and in an oxygenated environment.
block.northstar.oxygen_concentrator.tool: Collects _Oxygen_ from the air. _(Doesn't work on other planets!)_
Emits _redstone signal_ when block in front is oxygenated.
block.northstar.oxygen_filler.tooltip.su: When pumped with _oxygen,_ fills inserted equipment with _oxygen_.
block.northstar.oxygen_generator.tooltip: When provided with _Oxygen_ from behind and _Kinetic Energy_ from below, oxygenates the _surrounding environment._
block.northstar.oxygen_sealer.tooltip.be: Toggles the cap making it a full block.
block.northstar.oxygen_sealer.tooltip.su: When provided with _Oxygen_ from behind and _Kinetic Energy_ from below, oxygenates the _surrounding environment_.
block.northstar.rocket_station.tooltip.b: Opens menu with _Star Map_ slot, which controls Rocket's _Destination_.
block.northstar.telescope.tooltip.summar: Can be used to take _Astronomical Readings_ with paper.
block.northstar.temperature_regulator.to: Changes the temperature of all surrounding blocks it can spread to
block.northstar.vent.tooltip.behaviour1: Turns into an _insulated vent_. Insulated vents prevent _temperature_ from passing but still let air through.

northstar.contraption.controls.sit_down: All entities must be seated before controlling rocket!
northstar.gui.astronomy_table.close_data: Data points are too close together!
northstar.gui.combustion_engine.title: Combustion Engine Stats
northstar.gui.rocket_too_big: Rocket size exceeds Create's maximum contraption size. Increase config value or decrease rocket size
northstar.gui.telescope.button_tooltip: Use paper to take Astronomical Reading
northstar.gui.telescope_fail: Telescope must be able to see stars
northstar.gui.temperature_regulator.step: Use control to step by 20 and shift for 100
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_1: The rocket needs thruster(s) to be able to fly, the amount required is dependent on the size and weight of the rocket.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_2: The thrusters require fuel, you need one or more tanks containing Methane or Hydrocarbon.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_3: And optionally some additional storage for equipment and resources.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_4: Rockets also need at least one seat to sit on during the flight.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_5: The rocket station allows to choose the destination and assemble the rocket.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_6: Rocket controls allow to launch the rocket once assembled.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_7: An interplanetary navigator is required to travel to other planets, this doesn't apply to moons.
northstar.ponder.rocket.text_8: Don't forget to glue it. You can use scaffolding or individual glue sections.
